backend/pom.xml.general_idea: Upgrade the Spring Boot parent version to 3.3.13 to align with the Java 17 migration and modernize the framework stack.
backend/pom.xml.why_exists: Spring Boot 3.x requires Java 17 as a baseline; using Spring Boot 2.7.1 with Java 17 is supported but prevents access to Spring Boot 3 features and may cause compatibility issues with newer libraries targeting Spring Boot 3.

backend/pom.xml.general_idea: Update the Java version property to 17 to enforce the target JDK for compilation and execution.
backend/pom.xml.why_exists: Without this change, the project would continue to compile and run against Java 11, failing to utilize Java 17 features or meet the migration requirement.

backend/src/main/java/pt/ulisboa/tecnico.general_idea: Migrate JPA entity annotations from javax.persistence to jakarta.persistence to align with Jakarta EE 9+ standards required by Spring Boot 3.
backend/src/main/java/pt/ulisboa/tecnico.why_exists: javax.persistence package is removed in Jakarta EE 9+; code fails to compile with 'package javax.persistence does not exist' on JDK 17 with Spring Boot 3.

backend/src/main/java/pt/ulisboa/tecnico.general_idea: Migrate transactional annotation import from javax.transaction to jakarta.transaction to comply with Jakarta EE namespace changes in Spring Boot 3.
backend/src/main/java/pt/ulisboa/tecnico.why_exists: The javax.transaction package is no longer available in the classpath when using Spring Boot 3 (which requires Jakarta EE 9+), causing a compilation error due to missing import.

backend/src/main/java/pt/ulisboa/tecnico.why_exists: javax.persistence package is removed in Jakarta EE 9+ (Spring Boot 3), causing compile errors for missing classes.

backend/src/main/java/pt/ulisboa/tecnico.general_idea: Migrate transactional annotation import from javax to jakarta namespace to comply with Jakarta EE 9+ standards required by Spring Boot 3.
backend/src/main/java/pt/ulisboa/tecnico.why_exists: Compilation error: package 'javax.transaction' does not exist in Java 17/Spring Boot 3 environment; the API has been moved to 'jakarta.transaction'.
